input.title: Internal Support KB Plan
input.problem_summary: A support team wants a RAG baseline over product docs, runbooks, and incident notes.
assumptions: Citation quality matters more than advanced orchestration
The first launch can use text-only retrieval
risks: Premature agentic workflow could hide missing retrieval traces

rationale: 这是新系统规划，应优先建立带引用和元数据的 baseline，而不是直接升级到 agentic RAG。
